description: Pale bun, raw pink center, no sear marks
Dark golden sear, juices running clear, firm to the touch
Bright red center, very soft, cold to the touch
Crisp char on both sides, no pink visible, steaming
Squishy patty, blood pooling on the plate
Even brown crust, piping hot center, slight sizzle
Patty bends easily, completely pink inside
Patty holds shape, deep brown color, smells smoky
Thoroughly cooked all the way through, well-browned
Just placed on the grill, no color change yet
Crusty, dark on the outside, fully heated inside
